profile.name: Arjun Mehta
profile.bio: I design and ship backend systems that stay fast, reliable, and observable. Currently building distributed systems at scale.

projects.title: HyperStream

experience.description: Leading the core infrastructure team. Scaled microservices to handle 1M+ RPM.
Developed real-time data processing pipelines using Apache Kafka and Go.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs for a high-growth consumer app.
